params.name: King's Gayageum
params.description:
On Aug 3, 500 AD, Koryea's first national musical instrument, Gayageum, was invented.
The King of Gaya acquired a music instrument called the zheng from Northern Wei. Based on the zheng, Gaya King, a music enthusiast, developed a 12-string instrument called the Gayageum, and created many pieces of Korean folk music that spread through generations. It's said that its melodious sound can take the listener back to the ancient beautiful Korea. The most well-known pieces to this day are Gayageum s …
